title: agents.yaml policies block schema
description: Schema fragment for the new top-level `policies` block in agent-coordinator/agents.yaml. Validates the worker-validator vendor-diversity policy. Other policy types may be added under this block in future changes.

vendor_diversity.description: Constrains which vendors may be selected for which roles within a single OpenSpec change session.

enforce_for.description: Role pairs subject to the constraint. Empty array disables the policy.

fallback.description: How the dispatcher behaves when the policy cannot be satisfied (e.g., only one vendor available). 'warn_and_continue' is the default; 'block' is reserved for future strict-policy modes.

scope.description: Granularity at which the policy is enforced. 'per_change' (default) means the constraint applies across all packages within one OpenSpec change. 'per_package' would enforce within each work package only.
